citation: Gat et al., Discrete Flow Matching, 2024
use: The probability path and scheduler are central to discrete flow matching. A9 changes only the positive-density time weighting used to train the same endpoint posterior and sampler.

citation: Lipman et al., Flow Matching for Generative Modeling, 2023
use: Reweighting time samples changes optimization emphasis but preserves the pointwise conditional flow target wherever the weighting has nonzero density.
